ClosePeerConnSyncDns.peerConnId: The peer connection ID for which DNS record synchronization is to be disabled
ClosePeerConnSyncDns.role: The role of the connection: "initiator" for the initiating end, "acceptor" for the accepting end
ClosePeerConnSyncDns.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
